He is voiced byNathan Fillion. 42 lives in a fishtank in a Japanese restaurant in the town ofPatience, Colorado. He encountersHarry Vanderspeigle, an alien who has crashed on Earth and who is passing as human, and has a telepathic conversation with him. He is somewhat foul-mouthed and sarcastic, and is bitter about his situation. Harry eventually breaks 42 out of the restaurant, bringing him to live in a new aquarium inhis cabin. 42 lives in a fishtank in a Japanese restaurant in the town ofPatience, Colorado. characters.name: Liv Baker
characters.description: Liv BakerAliasesOlivia(full name)Deputy LivDeputyJustine Preacher(undercover)LivyDeputy Can’t Park(byMike Thompson)Deputy Beam-Me-Up Baker(byPatienceresidents)RelativesBill(father)John Baker(husband)Cathy †(aunt)Alice "Nana" Baker(grandmother)Unnamed great-grandfather †OccupationSheriff DeputyAgent ofWestern Oversight of NEPStatusAliveGenderFemaleSpeciesHumanEpisode debut1.01 "Pilot"Portrayed byElizabeth Bowen Agent ofWestern Oversight of NEP Something happened to me. There's alien activity here, in Patience. I know it. Liv Baker is the sheriff's deputy of Mike Thompson in the village ofPatience, Colorado. Something of a timid individual, she tends to be subsumed by Thompson's strong personality and has trouble speaking up for herself.Harry Vanderspeiglelikens her to a pet rabbit that you yell at so much that its hair starts to fall out. Despite this, she can be powerful when she is able to actually stand up for herself and has a keen detective insight. She is well-liked for her sense of fairness and justice. Despite this, she still manages to get results because of the fact that people like her and therefore are willing to open up to her. Eventually, she resigns as a sheriff's deputy due to Thompson's continued ill treatment of her, despite her best efforts to help solve a murder case. Afterwards, Thompson comes to realize the error of his ways and apologizes to her in song, upon which she accepts his offer to resume her duties as deputy. Afterwards, the two begin working together more closely and he admits to her that her instincts are often on target, even going so far as to buy her a coffee-maker, though still claiming that it's for the whole office. As summer comes to Patience, the two continue to work together on a more comfortable basis, though Mike in some ways seems to revert back to his old behavior. Liv eventually confronts him about the matter and he reveals the truth of his past: that in Washington D.C., he lost his partner and long-time best friend,Jesse. To this day, he blames himself for the incident, revealing also his own fear that he will lose Baker as well. She assures him that no such thing will happen and that she is there for him. Liv witnessed an alien spaceship in her youth and since then has had a fascination with anything related to aliens. She is convinced that there is alien activity in Patience and has contacted the alien tracker,Peter Bach, in the hopes of uncovering it.

characters.name: D'arcy Bloom
characters.description: D'arcy BloomAliasesD’arceWhore(byJudy Cooper)Ho bag(byJudy)Raggedy Ann(byHarry Vanderspeigle)Red(byHarry)Marcy(byHarry)Darby(byHarry)Red Menace(byDale)RelativesBethany Bloom(mother)Gerald Bloom(father)Louisa(first cousin once removed)Sher-Sher(cousin)Colette(first cousin once removed)Isabella Rose Hawthorne(semi-adoptive child)OccupationOlympic skier(formerly)BartenderStatusAliveGenderFemaleSpeciesHumanEpisode debut1.01 "Pilot"Portrayed byAlice WetterlundOlga Petsa(teen) I would do anything for Asta. So if you've dragged her into something that's gonna hurt her, I might just have to kill you myself. D'arcy Bloomis a character in the science fiction comedy television seriesResident Alien. She is portrayed byAlice Wetterlund. She is into "bad boys" and feels an immediate attraction towardsHarry Vanderspeigle. She is the chief bartender in the tavern of the town ofPatience, Colorado,The 59. She also searches as a member of the town’s avalanche control team. She left Patience for a time and chased her dream as an Olympic skier, but her dream ended when she took a terrible fall and shattered her leg. She is friends with bothAsta TwelvetreesandJudy Cooper, though she often trades barbs with the latter regarding “slutty” behavior. She has a reputation as the town drunk, but longs for something deeper, feeling that she has lost her chance for happiness in life and struggling to find a meaningful connection with someone. Although she struggles with issues of self-respect, many like her because of her pure fearlessness and open spirit. She seems to self-sabotage her relationships with men, feeling that she will always inevitably mess them up. D'arcy and Asta are best friends, a relationship that blossoms even as Asta faces new stress in the form of dealing with the secret of Harry Vanderspeigle, who is an alien that originally came to Earth to kill all humans and took the form of a human doctor. Asta's secret threatens to create a rupture of their friendship, but eventually Harry himself reveals the truth to D'arcy in order to prevent this from happening, having learned the power of human relationships.

characters.name: Bobby Smallwood
characters.description: Bobby SmallwoodBridgetin Bobby Smallwood's formRelativesDr. Smallwood(sister)StatusDeceasedDate of birthEarly 1930sDate of deathApproximately 1941Place of deathMines ofPatience, ColoradoCause of deathLikely suffocation or starvationGenderMaleSpeciesHumanEpisode debut2.10 "The Ghost of Bobby Smallwood"Portrayed byKesler TalbotBobby Smallwoodis a character onSyfy'sResident Alien. He is portrayed byKesler Talbot. As a young boy inPatience, Colorado, Bobby went out hunting withhis sister, hoping to fulfill his mother's request to bring home dinner. He rushed off, pursuing a rabbit, despite his sister's pleas to wait. He followed the rabbit into an unstable mineshaft and was never found again. Approximately 81 years later,a babyof analien speciesdiscovered Smallwood's remains. He then used the lingering DNA from the remains to assume a human form, which would then become his appearance to all but those rare few humans born with the ability to see through such disguises. Upon being reunited with his alien father,Harry Vanderspeigle, however, Bridget stopped using this disguise, but later used that ofLiza Vanderspeigle, the daughter of thehumanwhose identity Harry had assumed.

In his human form asBobby Smallwood, he is portrayed byKesler Talbot. As an alien, he is puppeteered by Jeny Cassidy[1]and voiced byAndrea Geones. Geones is uncredited throughout thesecond seasonofResident Alien, but receives a credit beginning in thethird season. The humalien was born from egg created when thealienGoliathimpregnated himself with the genetic tissue of the humanViolinda Darvell. Upon doing so, Goliath fossilized in order to develop the egg. The creature that hatches from the egg appears fully alien, thoughHarry Vanderspeiglestates that because of it being half-human it is in some way different and likely will develop human emotions in some fashion. Goliath inserts something of himself inside the humalien's mind in order to send Harry a message. The creature that hatches from the egg appears fully alien, thoughHarry Vanderspeiglestates that because of it being half-human it is in some way different and likely will develop human emotions in some fashion. Goliath inserts something of himself inside the humalien's mind in order to send Harry a message. The humalien later wandered in the mines ofPatiencewhere "59 died to save one." There, he discovered the remains of a boy named Bobby Smallwood and used the residual DNA to assume the boy's form. Sahardiscovers the humalien as Bobby Smallwood and tries to hide him and raise him in order to keep him from Harry. The humalien, however, escapes. Harry then tries to kidnap Sahar in order to find the baby, only to discover that the two of them share the same goal and end up teaming up with her grudgingly. The two track the baby to a forest, only for it to be taken by a team of "Men in Black" lead byGeneral McCallister. Harry texts 911, attempting to report the news to his friendAsta Twelvetrees. Goliath inserts something of himself inside the humalien's mind in order to send Harry a message. The humalien later wandered in the mines ofPatiencewhere "59 died to save one." There, he discovered the remains of a boy named Bobby Smallwood and used the residual DNA to assume the boy's form. Sahardiscovers the humalien as Bobby Smallwood and tries to hide him and raise him in order to keep him from Harry. The humalien, however, escapes. Harry then tries to kidnap Sahar in order to find the baby, only to discover that the two of them share the same goal and end up teaming up with her grudgingly. characters.name: Bruce
characters.description: BruceOccupationPrison guardStatusDeceasedGenderMaleSpeciesGrey alienEpisode debut4.01 "Prisoners"Portrayed byJinkx Monsoon(voice)Bruceis a character in the science fiction comedy television seriesResident Alien. AGrey alien, he is voiced byJinkx Monsoon. A Grey alien, Bruce serves a prison guard for the Grey based on the Earth's moon. He has longed to see what life is like on Earth andHarry VanderspeigleandRobert Hutchinsuse this to their advantage to get him to aid their escape. Harry VanderspeigleandRobert Hutchinsfind themselves imprisoned on the Grey's moonbase. They settle into a routine, but one day Bruce brings them their meal instead of their usual guard. He tells them that he named himself after Earth's number one movie star:Bruce Dern. He tells them that they are lucky, that he would do anything to get to Earth. Upon hearing this, Robert realizes that they can use Bruce to escape, though it takes a little while for Harry to catch onto the plan. They then tell Bruce that if he lets them go, they will take him to Earth with them. He tells them not to lie to a Grey, that they can always tell, then admits that they actually can't. He lets them go and they make for the escape ship, him informing them that the guards are all on strike, so they won't be caught. A Grey alien, Bruce serves a prison guard for the Grey based on the Earth's moon. He has longed to see what life is like on Earth andHarry VanderspeigleandRobert Hutchinsuse this to their advantage to get him to aid their escape.

characters.name: Carlyn
characters.description: CarlynRelativesKate Hawthorne(cousin)OccupationLaser physicistStatusAliveGenderFemaleEpisode debutSeason 2Portrayed byAlex BorsteinCarlynis a character slated to appear on thesecond seasonof Syfy'sResident Alien. She is a cousin ofKate Hawthorneand is described as being a frizzy-haired, socially-awkward, right-brained laser physicist. She pays a visit toPatienceand strikes up a relationship withHarry Vanderspeigle. Carlyn is portrayed byAlex Borstein.[1] Carlyn comes to visit Patience at the invitation of her cousin, Kate Hawthorne. When the two go hiking in the woods, Carlyn trips and cuts her knee. Kate takes her to the home ofHarry Vanderspeigle, hoping that Harry can treat Carlyn's wound. While Harry is not pleased at their presence at first, he and Carlyn seem to have a connection. Carlyn is interested in the equipment that he has sitting on his table, not realizing that he is using it to build analien radioto contact his people. She compliments his work as being quite advanced and comments that she's never known someone who's into this stuff who wasn't also a troll. He replies that trolls live under bridges and Kate clarifies that Carlyn thinks he's handsome.

characters.name: Lisa Casper
characters.description: Lisa CasperAliasesSarah Houston(undercover)RelativesDavid Logan(undercover husband)OccupationMilitary agentStatusDeceasedPlace of deathAmtrak train en route to Colorado(Cardinal Line)Cause of deathStrangled byHarry Vanderspeigleand subsequently decapitated by passing train.GenderFemaleSpeciesHumanEpisode debut"Homesick"Portrayed byMandell MaughanLisa Casperwas the secondary antagonist of the science fiction comedy television seriesResident Alien. She andDavid Loganare dispatched by GeneralMcCallisterto findthe alien. Lisa Casper is portrayed byMandell Maughan. Lisa Casper is a government agent assigned by General McCallister to assist David Logan in his search for an alien that has crashed on Earth, assigned to play the role of his "wife" under the name of "Sarah Houston." Ruthless and seemingly without morals, Casper is willing to do whatever it takes for them to complete the mission without being detected, even if it means hurting children or even killing people. Smug and self-assured, she immediately rubs Logan the wrong way, and he expresses to McCallister the opinion that she is "psychotic." He soon learns, however, that McCallister is well aware of Casper's true nature and is only concerned with getting results. David Logan and Lisa Casper are out investigating in the snowy mountains of Colorado when they come across something bizarre: the skeleton of a man and two birds of prey floating mysteriously in mid-air. characters.name: Cletus
characters.description: CletusRelativesMike Thompson(owner)Jesse(former owner)OccupationPolice dogStatusAliveGenderMaleSpeciesDog(mixed breed, possibly part French bulldog)Episode debut1.03 "Secrets"Cletusis a character on the Syfy seriesResident Alien. He is a police dog working under SheriffMike Thompsonand DeputyLiv BakerofPatience, Coloradoand formerly belonged to Sheriff Thompson's partner and best friend,Jesse. Cletus is a trained male police dog and a talented sniffer. He is able to sniff out a corpse and will bark to alert those in the area of any discovery. He is extremely fond of meat, particularly his bison dog treats. Sheriff Thompson dotes on Cletus, talking to him in baby talk and calling him his "best deputy," even as his actual deputy, Liv Baker, stands writing on a notepad "I hate Cletus." Cletus was formerly owned byJesse, Sheriff Thompson's partner and best friend, who was killed in the line of duty. Sheriff Thompson was devastated by Jesse's death and did not feel himself ready when their mutual friendBillbrought the dog to him, but Bill told him that he was the only person Jesse would ever trust the dog with. Cletus a mixed-breed dog, possibly part French bulldog. He is small with mostly white fur, but with black fur around the mouth and nose. He is normally seen wearing a police vest. characters.name: Violinda Darvell
characters.description: Violinda DarvellRelativesGoliath(lover)OccupationArt collector / Gallery proprietorStatusAliveGenderFemaleSpeciesHumanEpisode debut2.06 "An Alien in New York"Portrayed byMaxim Roy Violinda Darvellis a character in the science fiction comedy television seriesResident Alien. She is portrayed byMaxim Roy. Violinda Darvell is the owner and operator of a prestigious art gallery in New York, near Times Square. At some point, she metGoliath, an alternate form ofHarry Vanderspeiglefrom the future, with a great talent for painting. The two of them fell in love and at some point, consummated their relationship and produced an egg. Violinda Darvell is the owner and operator of a prestigious art gallery in New York, near Times Square. At some point, she metGoliath, an alternate form ofHarry Vanderspeiglefrom the future, with a great talent for painting. The two of them fell in love and at some point, consummated their relationship and produced an egg. Violinda would later meet Harry Vanderspiegle's original form when, along withAsta Twelvetrees, came to New York searching for a message left by Goliath. When Harry discovered the egg, she at first tried to protect it. However, after being shot byLisa Casper, she entrusted the egg to Harry, knowing that he should care for it. It is unclear if she was aware that Goliath was a version of Harry that had returned from the future.

characters.name: Elliot
characters.description: ElliotOccupationArchaeologistStatusAliveGenderMaleSpeciesHumanEpisode debut2.04 "Radio Harry"Portrayed byJustin Rain Elliotis a character in the science fiction comedy seriesResident AlienHe is a Native American archaeologist who strikes up a romance withD'arcy Bloom. Elliot is a Native American archaeologist who works with an organization that preserves and catalogs Native American artifacts. He was not raised traditionally and for his tribe, many of the old ways died with his grandmother's generation in boarding schools. He enjoys the physicality of holding artifacts as it feels like he's connected to something that was gone forever. Elliot is a Native American archaeologist who works with an organization that preserves and catalogs Native American artifacts. He was not raised traditionally and for his tribe, many of the old ways died with his grandmother's generation in boarding schools. He enjoys the physicality of holding artifacts as it feels like he's connected to something that was gone forever. Elliot strikes up a romance with D'arcy Bloom, a bartender inPatience, Colorado. D'arcy is reluctant to give the relationship a chance at first, due to her history of self-sabotaging relationships. characters.name: Ethan Stone
characters.description: Ethan StoneOccupationDoctorStatusDeceasedPlace of deathThe mountain pass intoPatience, ColoradoCause of deathCrushed by an alien ship shot down by the militaryGenderMaleSpeciesHumanEpisode debut1.06 "Sexy Beast"Portrayed byMichael Cassidy Dr. Ethan Stoneis a character in the science fiction comedy television seriesResident Alien. He is portrayed byMichael Cassidy. Dr. Ethan Stone is tapped by MayorBen Hawthorneto become the new town doctor ofPatience, Coloradoand replaceHarry Vanderspeigle, who had been filling in following the death ofSam Hodges. An accomplished physician, he has traveled to Haiti as part of his work with Doctors Without Borders. He is also an athlete, having rowed in Sydney in 2000 and skied in Torino in 2006. His notable good looks and charming personality bring him into immediate conflict with Vanderspeigle, an alien in human form, who feels jealousy about the attention heaped on Stone and insecurity due to his lingering worries about fooling others with his human act. He is later captured by the government agentsLisa CasperandGeneral McCallister, acting on the tip that the alien in Patience is the "town doctor." characters.name: Ethan Stone (alien)
characters.description: Ethan StoneStatusAliveGenderMaleSpeciesHarry Vanderspeigle's speciesEpisode debut4.10 "The End Is Here"Portrayed byMichael CassidyThisalientook the form of the doctorEthan Stone. He came to the planet Earth attempting to fill the mission of killing all humans originally given tothe alienthat took the form ofHarry Vanderspeigle, but quickly ran into complications. Like the original Dr. Ethan Stone, he is portrayed byMichael Cassidy. While Ethan Stone is out driving back toPatience, trying to prove that his life was ruined by aliens and that they exist, he ends up being killed when another alien ofHarry Vanderspeigle's specieswhen that alien's spaceship crashed. The alien then takes on his form and makes his way back to Patience, determined to complete Harry's original mission of killing all humans. While Ethan Stone is out driving back toPatience, trying to prove that his life was ruined by aliens and that they exist, he ends up being killed when another alien ofHarry Vanderspeigle's specieswhen that alien's spaceship crashed. The alien then takes on his form and makes his way back to Patience, determined to complete Harry's original mission of killing all humans. Once there, however, his presence is quickly detected byMax Hawthorne's ability to see through alien disguises, as well as the fact that a number of the townspeople are now are aware that there are aliens among them. Harry, however, having come to understand humanity, realizes that he does not need to kill this alien, as as with him, humanity will rub off on him. He thinks to himself that to do so would be to kill the humanity growing inside him and that he does not want to do that.

characters.name: Gerard Hundemer
characters.description: Gerard HundemerStatusDeceasedPlace of deathHome inPatience, ColoradoCause of deathAssisted suicide byHarry VanderspeigleGenderMaleSpeciesHumanEpisode debut"Homesick"Portrayed byJohn Innes Gerard Hundemeris a character on the science fiction comedy television seriesResident Alien. He is an elderly man who is a patient of thePatience Health Clinic. Gerard is portrayed by John Innes. Gerard pays a visit to thePatience Health Clinicshortly afterHarry Vanderspeigle, an alien posing as a human doctor, becomes the new town doctor of Patience. He tells the nurse,Asta Twelvetrees, that while he liked the previous, now deceased, doctor,Sam Hodges, Sam would always tell him not to eat certain things, that his diet was going to kill him. Asta tells him that what he eats is important, but Harry speaks up, stating that he doesn't agree. He continues that there are ten things on Gerard's chart that will kill him sooner than eating bad food.

characters.name: Goliath
characters.description: This article is about a form taken by the alien Harry Vanderspeigle. You may be looking for the original form of theHarry Vanderspeiglealien.Goliath (Goliato)HumanAlienAliasesThe Ghost of New YorkHarry VanderspeigleRelativesBridget(child)OccupationArtist (Painter)StatusDeceased(survives as Harry)Place of deathNew YorkCause of deathFossilization (as a result of pregnancy)GenderNoneMale(assumed)SpeciesAlienEpisode debut"Escape from New York"Portrayed byDavid Bianchi Harry Vanderspeigle Male(assumed) Harry Vanderspeigle comes to develop an attachment to those on Earth, particularlyAsta Twelvetrees, despite having originally arrived on the planet with the intention of activatinga deviceto kill all humans. He, however, is the lone survivor of the desolation of the Earth by another alien race. He then survives for some 500 years, growing old in his human form, before discovering a time portal by another alien species with takes him back to approximately 33 years before he arrived on Earth. He then takes a new human form, Goliath and settles into New York as an artist, where he begins painting a series of messages for his original self.

characters.name: Mitch Green
characters.description: Mitch GreenOccupationMayor ofJessupStatusAliveGenderMaleSpeciesHumanEpisode debut2.02 "The Wire"Portrayed byDavid Lewis Mitch Greenis a character in the science fiction comedy television seriesResident Alien. He is portrayed byDavid Lewis. Mitch Green is the mayor ofJessup, Colorado, a city near toPatience. He slanders the city of Patience by running an ad highlighting the recent murders in that city and promoting his own town in opposition to it. The ad infuriatesBen Hawthorne, the mayor of Patience. Later, Ben and his wifeKateencounter Mayor Mitch in person while eating at a restaurant in Jessup. He offers them a bottle of water, trying to claim a vintage for it, but Ben tells him they're good on the water. Sensing tension, he states that rivalry is good for them, telling him that he just has a higher hill to climb with Patience's 59 dead miners story. Kate, however, replies that the story of the 59 is a beautiful story about people who were willing to save each other. She tells him that if he can't see that, he's an idiot and insults the water as well as the restaurant's salad. He leaves, saying that he can't help with their anger management issues, but that the salad will be comped. Mitch Green is the mayor ofJessup, Colorado, a city near toPatience. characters.name: Ben Hawthorne
characters.description: Ben HawthorneAliasesMayor SnowflakeBennyMr. President(byLiv Baker)Mr. MayorRelativesKate Hawthorne(wife)Max Hawthorne(son)Isabella Rose Hawthorne(daughter)Dickie Hawthorne†(great-great grandfather)Jim(uncle)OccupationMayor ofPatienceStatusAliveGenderMaleSpeciesHumanEpisode debut1.01 "Pilot"Portrayed byLevi FiehlerLukas Goas(teen) Lukas Goas(teen) I've been trying so hard to change this town... to make it perfect. And it already is. At least to me. And... I don't want it to change. I'm just so tired... of trying to get everyone to like me.""Oh, honey. Everybody loves you.""No, they don't. I'm just the mayor to them.""No.""But I know that you do. You know, that's what matters." Ben Hawthorne is the mayor of the small town ofPatience. His somewhat flaky behavior has earned him the nickname "Snowflake" from SheriffMike Thompson. He is married toKate Hawthorneand is the father of the boyMax Hawthorne, who can see through the alienHarry Vanderspeigle's human disguise, as well as a currently unnamed child abducted from his wife's womb byThe Greys. He had a standing therapy appointment withSam Hodgeson Tuesdays at 4 P.M. and demands that Vanderspeigle continue the arrangement as the new town doctor. Hawthorne is a people-pleaser. He wants to do right by everyone, but this often results his allowing people to run over him. He admits that he is scared of everything, though, when pressed, he can show a surprising reserve of courage. He has an ongoing rivalry with the neighboring town ofJessupand its mayor,Mitch Green. Determined to improve Patience, he sets aboard to have a resort built within the town, but is opposed at every turn by the town's residents, including his wife, who feel that a resort would drive away the town's small businesses and ruin its charm.

characters.name: Kate Hawthorne
characters.description: Kate HawthorneAliasesKendra(alter ego)Mrs. Mayor(byMitch Green)Mrs. Mayor Snowflake(byHarry Vanderspeigle)Killer Kate(by herself)RelativesBen Hawthorne(husband)Max Hawthorne(son)Isabella Rose Hawthorne(daughter)Carlyn(cousin)OccupationSchoolteacherLawyer(not practicing)StatusAliveGenderFemaleSpeciesHumanEpisode debut1.01 "Pilot"Portrayed byMeredith Garretson You know, I always admire you. Feel like no matter how bad things get, you always manage to stay positive. Like... like you're still able to have hope that things will get better.""I always try.""Yeah. Wish I had some of that. My baby is... is gone and every day that goes by, I feel further and further away from her." Kate Hawthorneis a character in the science fiction comedy television seriesResident Alien. She is portrayed byMeredith Garretson. Kate Hawthorne is a woman who lives inPatience. She is married to the town's mayor,Ben Hawthorne, and is the mother of the boyMax Hawthorne, who can see through the alienHarry Vanderspeigle's human disguise, as well as a currently unnamed child who was abducted from her womb byThe Greys. She is a teacher at her son's school, which has led to him becoming something of an outcast among his peers. She and her husband have something of a troubled relationship, as she is an assertive, dominant personality, while he tends to be much more submissive in nature. She is a professional lawyer, but gave up her dream to have a family and live in Patience. Having grown up in a large town, Kate never had the same feeling of community that many Patience natives have, but comes to appreciate the town and the people in it.

Having grown up in a large town, Kate never had the same feeling of community that many Patience natives have, but comes to appreciate the town and the people in it.

characters.description: Max HawthorneAliasesLittle shit(byHarry Vanderspeigle)Dickhead(byHarry)Shit-for-brains(byHarry)Asshole(byHarry)Little shitbag(byHarry)Mama(byBridget)Shit monkey(byHarry)Giuseppe(byHarry)Little pecker(byHarry)Son of a bitch(byHarry)The Alien Tracker(by himself)RelativesBen Hawthorne(father)Kate Hawthorne(mother)Isabella Rose Hawthorne(younger sister)OccupationStudentStatusAliveGenderMaleSpeciesHuman(mutant)Episode debut1.01 "Pilot"Portrayed byJudah PrehnMax Hawthorneis a character in the science fiction comedy television seriesResident Alien. He is portrayed byJudah Prehn. Max Hawthorne is a 9-year-old schoolboy who lives inPatience. He is able to see throughHarry Vanderspeigle's human form and is greatly disturbed by him, at least at first. His bedroom is filled with paraphernalia related to aliens and outer space. He is the son ofBenandKate Hawthorne. He is one of only one in a million humans who is able to see through the molecular reconstruction process used by thealien's speciesto assume another identity, thanks to a genetic mutation. Vanderspeigle finds it uncanny that someone like him would be present in a town of only a thousand people. Max's ability is such that he is actually physically unable to see the guise that Vanderspeigle has adopted, seeing only the true form of the alien. The same power also gives him the ability to see a "green glow" emitted by items of alien origin, even when such items are hidden. Max's ability initially leads to antagonism between him and Vanderspeigle, the alien seeking to kill him as a threat, while he tries to expose the alien's true nature. When he befriends the girlSahar, a truce is eventually brokered, resulting in Max and Vanderspeigle finding themselves no longer at odds and Max even aiding Vanderspeigle at times. characters.name: Abigail Hodges
characters.description: Abigail HodgesRelativesSam Hodges(husband)✝OccupationBeauty salon owner/workerGenderFemaleSpeciesHumanEpisode debut1.01 "Pilot"Portrayed byDeborah Finkel Abigail Hodgesis a character in the science fiction comedy television seriesResident Alien. She is portrayed byDeborah Finkel. Abigail Hodges is the widow ofSam Hodges, whose murder becomes a major mystery in the town ofPatience, Colorado. Due to people passing the buck, she is not informed of her husband's death and only learns of it when she walks in onHarry Vanderspeigle, an alien assuming a human identity, who had just finished conducting the autopsy. She works at the local beauty salon. She is later implicated in her husband's murder, but is apparently a victim of circumstance or even a possibly a frame-up, the real killer being thereal Harry Vanderspeigleat the direction of theGalvan/Powell Group.
